# 📌 Your Question
Write your question here clearly and concisely.

# 🤔 Context
Explain what you were trying to do or understand when the question arose.

# 📚 Resources Consulted
Mention if you reviewed the documentation, the README, or other materials before asking the question.

# ✅ Expected Outcome
What answer or clarification do you expect to receive?
